name: add-ip
description: Scaffold a new IP and add an instance to soc.ssot.yaml. /add-ip <name> [cluster] [addr]

name: import-ipxact
description: Import an IP-XACT XML and register it as a new instance. /import-ipxact <path> [name] [cluster]

name: connect
description: Add a bus connection between two IP instances. /connect <a/iface> <b/iface> [proto]

name: check-addrmap
description: Run the address-map validator (overlaps, alignment, gaps).

name: wrapper-gen
description: Regenerate the top-level SoC wrapper RTL from soc.ssot.yaml.

name: regen-all
description: Dispatch rtl-gen on every IP instance whose status.rtl != ok.

name: soc-status
description: Show the current SoC composition + per-IP pipeline status.
